name: RiskFactor

fields.description: Stable factor identifier: wind | visibility | pressure | sunset | eta.
fields.name: key

fields.description: Short emoji/glyph used in the panel meter and factor list.
fields.name: icon

fields.description: Points this factor contributed to the total score (0..max).
fields.name: points

fields.description: Maximum points this factor can contribute (its weight cap).
fields.name: max

fields.description: One-line human-readable explanation of why these points were assigned.
fields.name: detail

description: A single explainable contributor to a leg's risk score (e.g. wind, visibility, pressure, sunset, ETA uncertainty).
